pi_items.metadata_value: Mumbai Port Area BVLOS Survey Authorization
pi_items.verified_value: Mumbai Port Area BVLOS Survey Authorization
pi_items.source: Task description lines 25-26; matches exact instruction text given to agent
Task description line 27; matches exact instruction value given to agent

Task description line 28; however, Aerobridge Authorization model (openskies-sh/aerobridge) does NOT have an 'operation_ceiling' field. Model only has: id, title, operation_max_height, operation_altitude_system, airspace_type, permit_to_fly_above_crowd, operation_area_type, risk_type, authorization_type, end_date, created_at, updated_at. Export script attempts to access auth.operation_ceiling (line 62) which will raise AttributeError at runtime.
Aerobridge Authorization model defines AIRSPACE_CHOICES = ((0, 'NA'), (1, 'Green'), (2, 'Amber'), (3, 'Red')); 'Green' is choice index 1 and valid
Task description line 31; matches exact instruction (Unchecked/No) and corresponds to Aerobridge permit_to_fly_above_crowd BooleanField default of False

Task description line 40; however, Aerobridge Authorization model does NOT have a 'start_date' field. Model only has 'end_date'. Export script attempts to access auth.start_date (line 67) which will raise AttributeError at runtime.
Task description line 41 specifies '2024-12-31 23:59:00'; Aerobridge Authorization model has end_date as DateTimeField; partial match on date portion
Local development server URL; confirmed in task_utils.sh line 9 (AEROBRIDGE_ADMIN_URL='http://localhost:8000/admin/'); task setup launches Firefox to this URL (setup_task.sh line 70)
Standard Django admin add-form URL pattern for registry.Authorization model; consistent with Django conventions for the path to the Authorization model add form

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic test task for the Aerobridge drone management system. The agent is instructed to create a flight authorization with these verified properties: Title='Mumbai Port Area BVLOS Survey Authorization', Max Height=400, Airspace Type='Green', Crowd Permit=False, End Date on 2024-12-31. The task uses a local development server at http://localhost:8000/admin/. CRITICAL: The task has design flaws—the expected_ceiling (500) and expected_start_date (2024-06-01) metadata fields do not correspond to fields in the actual Aerobridge Authorization model, which only has operation_max_height and end_date. The export_result.sh script will fail at runtime when attempting to access auth.operation_ceiling and auth.start_date due to AttributeError.
